# Earnest

> The AI-powered business operating system for creative agencies and service businesses.

Earnest replaces the pile of disconnected tools — CRM, project management, invoicing, social media, email marketing, calendaring, team chat, phone, video, and AI intelligence — with one unified platform.

## Key Information

- Website: https://earnest.guru
- App: https://app.earnest.guru
- Pricing: Solo ($49/mo), Studio ($149/mo), Agency ($299/mo)
- Every plan includes every feature. No feature gates.

## Features

- Productivity Engine: AI-powered command center that prioritizes your daily actions
- CRM Intelligence: Health scores, pipeline forecasts, and growth plans from your real data
- Health Snapshots: Instant business health scores — zero AI tokens required
- Marketing AI Analyze: One-click marketing health assessment with campaign plans
- AI Strategy Engine: Cross-module AI that generates campaigns and spots opportunities
- Brand Awareness AI: Per-client brand voice and positioning across all AI features
- Social AI Generate: Schedule to Instagram, LinkedIn, Facebook, Threads with AI content
- Email Marketing AI: Block-based newsletter builder with AI-generated content
- Goal Suggestions: AI-suggested strategic goals based on your business data
- Project Management: Kanban boards, task lists, timelines, and project dashboards
- People & Companies: Unified CRM for clients, contacts, prospects, and networking
- Quick Tasks & AI To-Dos: Personal task lists with AI suggestions and scheduling
- AI Token Management: Per-member AI usage budgets and monitoring
- Client Access Control: Role-based visibility with team assignments
- Invoicing & Billing: Stripe-powered invoices, proposals, and payment tracking
- Team Channels: Slack-style messaging built into your workspace
- Phone & Video: Twilio calling and Daily.co video linked to your CRM
- Calendar & CRM Hub: Calendar-first scheduling with Google/Outlook sync and booking pages
- CardDesk: AI-powered business card scanning with gamified networking
- Earnest Companion: Mobile-first companion app for business on the go
